title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 99.884 - Prior to issue of certificate of occupancy no transfer of property except transfer to mortgagee or lienholder — without approval — requirements
text:
99.884.  Prior to issue of certificate of occupancy no transfer of property except transfer to mortgagee or lienholder — without approval — requirements. — Prior to the issuance of a certificate of occupancy by the building official no transfer of the property or any interest therein, except a transfer to a bona fide mortgagee or similar lienholder, may be made by the homesteader without the approval of the urban homesteading agency, provided any such transfer may only be made for a consideration not in excess of the cost of the property to the homesteader together with the costs of any improvements made or construction thereon by the homesteader.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1434 & 1490 § 5 subsec. 3 subdiv. (3))
